All-in-one toolkit for your
Construction business

Odoo allows you to handle all aspects of construction projects from start to finish while eliminating pain points such as material shortages and budget management.

Start now
Meet an advisor
  • Micro Business (1-5 employees)
  • Small Business (6-50 employees)
  • Midsized company (51-250 employees)
  • Micro entreprise (1-5 employés) - Français
  • Petite entreprise (6-50 employés) - Français
  • Empresas Pequeñas (<50 empleados) - Español
  • Large company (250+ employees)

The most significant change that Odoo has brought to our business operations and culture is the sense of calm that has permeated our daily work life.

ARO
Staendiges Konsortium

Groundbreaking project management

All-in-one project hub. Manage all aspects of your construction project from one centralized dashboard. Use the top bar to handle all related records, from stock moves to planning shifts.

The best tool I ever had!

Never lose track of materials

Streamline purchasing. Keep track of all the vendor orders and optimize procurement with automated purchase agreements.

Barcode scanning. Use any type of barcode scanner to simplify inventory operations.

Material control. Track all materials you store and use on construction jobs. Inventory features include variants, UoM, packaging, serial numbers, and lots.

Find out more about compatible devices!
Inventory Hardware

Keep an eye on the costs

Invoice on YOUR terms. Charge customers upfront, after the job, or using down payments. Easily invoice by time and materials.

Make every hour count. Log timesheets by hours or full days, using a desktop or a mobile device.

Master the analytic overview. Easily keep track of expenses, and analyze cost distribution to ensure you turn profit on each job.

On to some final touches!

After-sales support. Clients will forget the issue but remember the service. Use Helpdesk and Field Service apps to provide five-star support at all times.

But wait! There's more.

All the features
done right.

Quotation builder

Send detailed quotations.

Clear traceability

Real-time reports on stock levels, inventory moves, and production.

Resource planning

Create shifts for employees and material resources.

Timesheet timer

Track time spent on tasks.

Invoicing

Create professional invoices.

Opportunities

Collect, centralize, and follow up on your potential customer's requests.

One need, one app.

Expand as you grow.

Odoo is a suite of open source business apps that cover all your company needs: CRM, eCommerce, accounting, inventory, point of sale, project management, etc.

Odoo's unique value proposition is to be at the same time very easy to use and fully integrated.
